title: Nob Hill Fire Investigation Update
summary: Syracuse Fire Department concluded investigation of the February 28, 2026 Nob Hill Apartments fire, classifying the cause as undetermined per NFPA 921 standards due to inability to eliminate multiple potential causes through scientific analysis. One fatality resulted from thermal injuries and smoke inhalation; a second death on the property was unrelated to the fire.
processing_notes: Author listed as Unknown; press release published from Mayor's Office/Communications
Investigation conclusion is routine follow-up to significant incident; no policy implications detected
NFPA 921 reference indicates professional standards compliance
Second fatality clarification suggests proactive transparency regarding casualty rumors
No CIO-relevant digital systems, data governance, or IT infrastructure issues identified
